On the north/west dam of the Mill Pond, there is a chain link fence on the pond side that is a supporting trellis for wild concord grapes. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: August-September.

On the south end of the Mill Pond's main large dam right as the dam ends and the trails begin on the South side there is a large stand of Autumn olives near a path that leads back to the neighborhood. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: August-November.
